User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Visionary Vault application.

email.description: The email address of the user.

registrationDate.description: The date and time the user registered.

AIModel.title: AIModel
AIModel.description: Represents an AI model used for image or video generation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AI model.

name.description: The name of the AI model.

description.description: A description of the AI model and its capabilities.

capabilities.description: The capabilities of the AI Model

GeneratedContent.title: GeneratedContent
GeneratedContent.description: Represents an AI-generated image or video.

id.description: Unique identifier for the generated content.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate the content.

generationDate.description: The date and time the content was generated.

ExamplePrompt.title: ExamplePrompt
ExamplePrompt.description: Represents an example prompt to inspire users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the example prompt.

promptText.description: The text of the example prompt.

description.description: A description of what the prompt generates.

aiModelId.description: Reference to AIModel. (Relationship: AIModel 1:N ExamplePrompt).  The AI model this prompt is designed for.

definition.description: Stores user data. Path-based ownership for private user data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores AI model information.  Globally accessible, but creation/modification should be restricted to admins.

params.name: aiModelId
params.description: The unique identifier for the AI model.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated content associated with a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: contentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the generated content.

definition.description: Stores example prompts associated with a specific AI model. Includes denormalized 'aiModelId' for authorization independence.

params.name: aiModelId
params.description: The unique identifier for the AI model.

params.name: promptId
params.description: The unique identifier for the example prompt.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to ensure authorization independence, clarity, and scalability, following the defined principles. User data is stored under `/users/{userId}` to establish clear ownership. AI models are stored in a global collection `/ai_models` as they are centrally managed. Generated content is nested under users (`/users/{userId}/generated_content/{contentId}`) for ownership and isolation. Example prompts are stored under `/ai_models/{aiModelId}/example_prompts` to link them to specific models.

*   **Authorization Independence:** The `GeneratedContent` includes the `userId` to avoid authorization lookups. The `ExamplePrompt` includes `aiModelId` for the same reason.
*   **QAPs:** Secure `list` operations are achieved through structural segregation: user-generated content is isolated under each user's path (`/users/{userId}/generated_content`). Public AI Models are in a separate collection `/ai_models` with independent rules. Example Prompts are nested under their AI Model to restrict listing to relevant prompts only.
